name: FunnelChart
searchText: funnelchart funnel chart component @mantine/charts /charts/funnel-chart children data funnelchartprops funnelprops labelcolor labelsposition size strokecolor strokewidth tooltipanimationduration tooltipdatasource tooltipprops valueformatter withlabels withtooltip

props.name: funnelChartProps
props.description: Props passed down to recharts FunnelChart component

props.name: funnelProps
props.description: Props passed down to recharts Pie component

props.name: labelColor
props.description: Controls text color of all labels

props.name: labelsPosition
props.description: Controls labels position relative to the segment

props.name: strokeColor
props.description: Controls color of the segments stroke, by default depends on color scheme

props.name: tooltipDataSource
props.description: Determines which data is displayed in the tooltip. 'all' – display all values, 'segment' – display only hovered segment.

props.name: tooltipProps
props.description: Props passed down to Tooltip recharts component

props.name: valueFormatter
props.description: A function to format values inside the tooltip and labels

props.name: withLabels
props.description: Determines whether each segment should have associated label

props.name: withTooltip
props.description: Determines whether the tooltip should be displayed when a section is hovered
